steps.title: Identify the reason phrase
steps.content: The underlined phrase follows the statement that advertisers hesitated to support television. It gives a specific circumstance that contributed to that hesitation: television-set manufacturing was stalled during World War II.

steps.title: Reject unrelated functions
steps.content: A overstates the radio comparison, C shifts to broadcasters' persuasion efforts, and D invents a point about programming popularity. None describes the underlined phrase's explanatory role. The answer is B.
